name: All Rules Have Been Deleted From The Windows Firewall Configuration
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: All Rules Have Been Deleted From The Windows Firewall Configuration
SIGMA Description: Detects when a all the rules have been deleted from the Windows Defender Firewall configuration

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('2033', '2059')) AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\system32\svchost.exe%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\programdata\microsoft\windows defender\platform*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY All Rules Have Been Deleted From The Windows Firewall Configuration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('2033', '2059')) AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\system32\svchost.exe%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\programdata\microsoft\windows defender\platform*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: All Rules Have Been Deleted From The Windows Firewall Configuration

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: All Rules Have Been Deleted From The Windows Firewall Configuration SIGMA Description: Detects when a all the rules have been deleted from the Windows Defender Firewall configuration  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
